Name: Search field
Description:
The search field allows the user to search for specific objects in the object list.

Note: Search bar will be present in case of more than 20 options. Else it will not be present.

Single%20object%20list%20picker%20309374cae3fa812895d1deffcef72709.md
Dynamic Behavior:
Entering a search query will refresh the object list with objects that match the search query term. 
The object list will refresh dynamically as the user enters their search query.
Highlight the search term in the results.
Default State: The search field would be empty
Error State: If there are no object results for a search query, the object list should show an empty state graphic.

Name: Header
Description: The header title describes the type of the object list content
Dynamic Behavior: Entering a search query will refresh the object list with objects that match the search query term.The object list will refresh dynamically as the user enters their search query
Content Rules:
Titles are typically nouns
Title should always make it clear which object list below
Title shoud be short with 1-2 word nouns e.g Liveboard, Tab, City etc.
Avoid overly long title
Don’t wrap or truncate title text
Title don’t need punctuation like periods or colons
Title should use sentence-case capitalization

Name: Object row
Dynamic Behavior:
Clicking anywhere in its row can select this object, or go to the next level when it has.
The object list icon is optional
Truncate text when it's longer than 1 linewith "...". Hover over on the truncated text display tooltip for full text.

Name: Create new
Description:
The create new action lets users can add a new object to the list.


Single%20object%20list%20picker%20309374cae3fa812895d1deffcef72709.md
Dynamic Behavior: After clicking on the create new button, display input box inline. The cursor shows in the input box directly. Click check mark to complete the task. Click cross button to cancel the task.
Default State: The text field is in the focus state, so that lets users enter text directly.
Error State: The error message temporarily replaces the field label. Display error icon and error message in red color.

Name: Chevron icon
Description: The chevron icon indicates this row has a deeper level.
Dynamic Behavior: Clicking anywhere in its row can go to the next level when it has.

Name: Selection
Description: It’s the item that has been selected.
Dynamic Behavior:
Clicking anywhere in its row can select this object.
Once something is selected, highlight the row with light blue color and a checkmark. 
There must be one object being selected. Clicking on the selected object won’t delect this object.

Name: Back
Description: The button lets user go back to previous state.
Dynamic Behavior: Clicking the button will take user to the previous state which is where the user was after clicking the chevron.
